buildTimeCorrections: CommunityPlansErrorFallback.tsx: spec assumed home-owned, but components/comment + 2 planner pages consume it via BanDialog/home — grep found it is consumed by planner (PlannerMDGesellschaft{,Detail}Page). Per dual-consumer rule it was relocated to components/common/ instead of pages/home/.

BanDialog.tsx: spec listed it as moving into pages/moderator/, but components/comment/CommentSection imports CommentDeleteDialog from it. Per dual-consumer rule it STAYS in components/moderation/; ModeratorPage imports it from the shared path unchanged.

yarn lint is pre-existingly broken in this env (await-thenable typed-linting rule lacks parserOptions.project; fails on untouched App.tsx). Boundary invariant verified via grep instead: no deep @/pages/*/** import statements outside router.tsx.
